wave_update: REFERRAL-PARITY-NOTIFS-W1 (2026-06-22): /api/referral/code stats += usdc_paid_usd_e2, terms += usdc_min_payout_usd (additive, for TG earnings parity + the gap-to-payout cue); 3 NEW internal-key-gated notification routes added below.
naming_law: program facts (bonus_calls/commission_pct/commission_months/usdc_min_payout_usd) project from src/lib/referral-constants.ts REFERRAL_TERMS via referralTerms(); money is e2-cents; never hardcoded in the API or the bot

surfaces.auth: internal-bypass key (checkInternalBypass: BOT_INTERNAL_BYPASS_ENABLED=true + X-AlgoVault-Internal-Key == ALGOVAULT_INTERNAL_BYPASS_KEY); 401 otherwise. Bot-only (loopback).

surfaces.idempotency: one grant per TG referee (referee_email = tgIdentity(chat_id), UNIQUE) → duplicate returns {recorded:false, reason:'already_attributed', bonus_calls:0}

surfaces.auth: internal-bypass key; 401 otherwise. Bot-only (the bot drains the tg channel).
forbidden_keys: tg:<hash> (returns CODE not the identity hash → bot maps code→chat_id locally)

consumers: algovault-bot notification drain cron (C2) — marks a row delivered after a successful Bot-API send

surfaces.note: engine hashes chat_id → tgIdentity → ensureUserCode → sets notify_opt_out on that code (single-derivation: same column as the email unsubscribe link)

surfaces.auth: PUBLIC, signed (t == HMAC(notify-unsub-salt, code)[:16]); low-stakes one-click email unsubscribe → setNotifyOptOut(code, true)
surfaces.error_contract: 400 invalid/expired link (bad sig or unknown code) · 200 confirmation page
consumers: the email manage/unsubscribe link in sendReferralFriendJoined / sendReferralEarned

migrations: 016_referral_channel_tg.sql (channel enum) + 018_referral_notifications.sql (REFERRAL-PARITY-NOTIFS-W1: NEW referral_notifications queue table + notify_opt_out column on referral_codes; pre-applied to prod PG via SSH; in-code dual-backend mirrors for fresh/test DBs)
data_integrity: no outcome_* exposed anywhere; raw chat_ids never persisted (opaque tg:<hash> identity lane); notifications return the referrer CODE not the hash (bot maps locally via cached referral_code); friend identity never leaked to the referrer; payload + stats are allow-listed
tools_list_impact: NONE — HTTP routes only; no MCP tool added (tools/list stays 9, byte-identical)
